GYM

Fitness & Performance Center

🎉 You Have Successfully Registered!

Dear {{ $json.fields.Name }},

Welcome to the GYM family! Your membership has been successfully activated. Here are your subscription details:

📅 Start Date

{{ $('Create a record').item.json.fields['Start date'] }}

📅 End Date

{{ $('Create a record').item.json.fields['end date'] }}

🏋️ Subscription Plan

{{ $('HTTP Request').item.json.body.submission.questions[2].value }}

We're excited to be part of your fitness journey. If you have any questions, don't hesitate to contact us.

See you at the gym! 💪
